purpose: Test error scratchpad (write delta not state) on v0.5.3
notes: KILL: early noise from meaningless deltas. Late steps 2.2x better but overall BPT worse.

purpose: Test pheromone-style decaying scalar trace in router
notes: KILL: marginal BPT but best late-step value. Pheromone trace needs time to accumulate.

purpose: Test depth-drop bootstrap (random truncation + KL to teacher)
notes: KILL: KL to teacher diverged to NaN at step 169. Numerically unstable at dim=128.

purpose: Test Grokfast gradient EMA filter (alpha=0.95, lambda=2.0)
notes: STRONG PASS: +11.0% BPT. Benefit grows with training steps. 5 lines of code.

purpose: Test Grokfast (alpha=0.98, lambda=5.0) - too aggressive
notes: KILL: lambda=5.0 too aggressive, caused NaN divergence.

purpose: Test Peri-LN (pre+post LayerNorm on each sublayer)
notes: PASS: +2.6% BPT with fewer params. Zero-cost normalization. Already in OLMo2/Gemma2/Gemma3.

purpose: 6-arm ablation: baseline, Peri-LN, +Surprise, +Pheromone, Full, +Grokfast
notes: Winner: v0.5.4+Grokfast (+13.6%). Surprise Bank KILLED (hurts all arms). Peri-LN+Pheromone=+5.9%.

purpose: True optimal: Peri-LN + Pheromone + Grokfast (no Surprise Bank)
notes: TRUE OPTIMAL: +15.9% BPT. Removing Surprise Bank drag gained extra 2.3pp over ablation best.

purpose: Tokenize 40GB FineWeb-Edu with GPT-2 BPE
notes: FAIL: OOM at 49.5% (4.32B tokens). Python list accumulation ~70GB RAM. Fixed with shard-based writes.

purpose: Tokenize FineWeb-Edu with shard-based disk writes
notes: RUNNING: shard-based, peak RAM ~4GB, writes every 200 chunks. Restart from scratch.

purpose: Trace which parameters each v0.6.0a loss term updates before re-launching dense-12 training
command: inline python gradient audit of L_final/L_step/L_probe on code/launch_v060a.py + code/train_v060a.py
notes: Confirmed detached-history split: L_final updates recurrent core + readout, L_step updates only final LN + tied embeddings, L_probe updates only gain_probe. Used to set conservative dense-12 stability hyperparameters.

purpose: 2-arm L_step ablation: baseline (sampled CE) vs no L_step
notes: Sampled L_step is BENEFICIAL. Without it, late improvement drops 19% (13.5→11.0) and best pass shifts from 11→10. Goldilocks zone: weak imprecise prediction signal keeps intermediate passes engaged.

purpose: Generation quality test across 15 diverse prompts at step 9000
notes: Severe repetition in greedy decoding (trigram_div=0.265). Model loops within 10-20 tokens. No factual knowledge. Expected at 68M/9K steps. Dominant failure is state-level attractor collapse in recurrent processing.

purpose: 3-arm L_step probe: baseline (sampled) vs exact (full-vocab CE on passes 7-10) vs none
notes: DEFINITIVE: Sampled L_step is Goldilocks zone. Exact CE causes catastrophic pass convergence (passes 8-11 all produce BPT ~9.2, best pass shifts from 11→9). No L_step causes gradual degradation. Current production config is correct.

purpose: v0.6.0a eval checkpoint
notes: BPT still monotonically improving. Power law predicted 7.38, actual 7.49 (slightly worse). Improvement 9K→10K = 0.052 BPT.

purpose: Measure pass-to-pass collapse profile at step 10K
notes: SEVERE COLLAPSE: passes 0-9 cosine 0.93-0.997 (near fixed-point). Pass 10→11 does 60% of ALL compression (15.02→7.35). Lambda jumps 1.89→4.60 at final pass. Model wastes 10 passes, compresses in 1. This is the target for adaLN pass conditioning.

purpose: Measure per-token pass disagreement as intrinsic uncertainty signal for elastic compute
notes: STRONG POSITIVE: ce_spread r=+0.96 with future gain. High-disagreement tokens get 4.8x benefit from additional passes. Phase transition at pass 10-11 confirmed. Validates elastic compute signal but may be partly collapse artifact. Re-test after anti-collapse fix.

purpose: 4-mode scratchpad ablation: full vs no_read vs no_write vs removed
notes: LOAD-BEARING: +3.27% BPT when removed. Read path is what matters (no_read = removed). Write alone also hurts (+3.17%). Recall impact modest (74%→72%). Scratchpad helps general LM quality more than specific recall. Validates architecturally but current mechanism is crude first draft.

purpose: SVD factorization feasibility of tied embedding matrix at ranks 64/128/256
notes: RISKY: Embedding matrix is nearly full-rank (flat singular spectrum after SV1=1773, SVs 2-768 all ~238). Rank-128 captures only 26.5% variance, NN preservation 2.4%. Factored embeddings NOT a warm-start option. Must train from scratch with factored architecture. Embedding tax (58.8%) confirmed severe but addressable only in next architecture.

purpose: Directional lm-eval benchmarks on step ~12K checkpoint
notes: Near-random on all except PIQA (+4.8%). Expected at 68M/0.4B tokens from scratch. LAMBADA near-zero confirms exact-recall gap (consistent with Zoology 82% finding). Directional only, not definitive.

purpose: kNN-LM ceiling test: post-hoc exact retrieval at 128K datastore, step 14K
notes: NEGATIVE result: kNN retrieval HURTS all categories except whitespace. 128K datastore too small, model representations too weak for retrieval. Validates ARMT (trained memory) over post-hoc retrieval.

purpose: Per-pass hidden state dynamics: cosine, delta norm, logit entropy at step 14K
notes: EXTREME pass collapse confirmed at hidden state level. cos(p10,p11)=0.236 (near-orthogonal), logit entropy flat at 10.1 for passes 0-10, crashes to 5.09 at pass 11. Model does ALL computation in final pass.

purpose: Generation quality test at step 14K best checkpoint, temp=0.8
notes: Major improvement from 9K (trigram_div 0.265 -> 0.973). Reasonable English syntax but no factual knowledge, number repetition, degenerate code.

purpose: Per-token-type pass entropy dynamics at step 14K
notes: Collapse is UNIVERSAL across token types but entropy floor differs. Whitespace compresses most (drop 6.47 bits), hard tokens least (4.60 bits). Control simplex pattern is latent.

purpose: Rerun pass disagreement with fixed collect_history bug, step ~13900
notes: INVERTED disagreement: easy tokens HIGH (0.78), hard tokens LOW (0.61). Model lacks mechanism to vary strategy by token type. Validates control simplex and random-depth.

purpose: v0.6.0a training milestone: 20K steps complete, best BPT=6.7946
notes: v0.6.0a training COMPLETE. New best BPT at 20K (beat 17K's 6.8284). Pass collapse confirmed structural (entropy flat 10.1 for 11 passes, crash at pass 12). Model shows real learning on SciQ/PIQA/LAMBADA above random. Training stopped for v0.6.0b-rd12 warm-start.

purpose: v0.6.0b-rd12 extended to 15K steps (WSD restart from v0.6.0a, random-depth)
notes: Extended from 5K to 15K mid-training. LR schedule discontinuity at step 3000→3500 (cosine recalculated from 5K to 15K, 2.17x LR jump). WSD optimizer reset at start. Pass collapse fixed (D8 beats D12). Training IN PROGRESS.

purpose: P0 v0.6.0c: Knowledge-preserving random-depth canary (optimizer preserved)
notes: P0 canary COMPLETE (750 steps). Pass collapse fixed at step 250 (D8 gap = -0.002). Optimizer preservation recovered 70-90% knowledge vs WSD reset. Step 250 = sweet spot. Rolling checkpoint LOST — must restart from parent for 15K.

purpose: v0.6.1 TokenwiseController + PassAdapters canary (falsified at 1K)
notes: Controller-only repair FALSIFIED. Modes biased transition columns but didn't gate real computation. mode_entropy=0.003 (pass-global, zero content dependence). BPT improved from base training, NOT controller/adapter. Stopped at 1100 steps per R9 decision.

purpose: P4: INT4 drift audit on v0.6.0a step 20K (forward-only, CPU)
data_ref: ShardedDataset test split, 10 batches x 2 samples x 512 tokens
command: inline python script (P4 INT4 drift audit)
notes: CATASTROPHIC: INT4 PTQ destroys shared-weight recurrent models. Drift compounds across 12 passes. QAT mandatory. Validates NeurIPS 2025 QEP prediction.
